narrative:
Brunswick Hills TWP township has 7,704 registered voters, with 55.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.6%, a clear Republican lean of 6.9 percentage points.
